description.value: By making minor adjustments to gravitational forces on your body, you make a controlled descent instead of falling. You glide slowly toward the ground, 5 feet down and up to 25 feet horizontally through the air. As long as you spend at least 1 action gliding each round and haven't yet reached the ground, you remain in the air at the end of your turn. If you use Steady Descent in zero gravity, you instead move up to half your fastest Speed in a direction of your choice.
